name: Morrocan Chicken with Preserved Lemons
recipeIngredient: 4 lb chicken, cut into 8 parts (legs, breast, and thighs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and lemon juice. Chill for 6 hours.
2. Combine all spices, ginger, and garlic in a food processor.
3. Brown the chicken pieces in olive oil.
4. Stir in onions and the spice mixture; turn the chicken pieces to coat well.
5. Add 1 ladle of chicken stock and cook over moderate heat, turning the pieces often.
6. Remove the breast parts after 20 minutes. Continue cooking the remaining chicken for another 25 minutes.
7. Return the breast to the pan. Add thinly sliced lemon rind and olives. Cook for an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
8. Adjust seasonings as needed.
9. Serve with white rice or couscous, chickpeas, and a salad.
